name: AMIDA Technology, Inc.
summary: AMIDA Technology, Inc. develops and provides electronic testing and measurement solutions for the semiconductor and optical industries in Taiwan. The company offers CMOS image sensing testers and VCSEL wafer measurement systems; analog and mixed signal testers; and high power 3600 series testers. It also provides PCI modules, such as GPIB cards with PCI interfaces; time interval counter modules for PCI computers; and single-channel PCI-based arbitrary waveform generators. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
